afterFilesCreation.name: initialize_project
afterFilesCreation.script: npm init -y && npm install --save aws-cdk aws-lambda aws-apigateway aws-dynamodb @aws-cdk/aws-lambda @aws-cdk/aws-apigateway @aws-cdk/aws-dynamodb

afterFilesCreation.name: setup_typescript
afterFilesCreation.script: npx tsc --init --rootDir src --outDir lib --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --lib es2017 --module commonjs --noImplicitAny --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --inlineSources && npm install --save @types/aws-lambda @types/aws-api-gateway

afterFilesCreation.name: setup_build_and_run_scripts
afterFilesCreation.script:
sed -i.bak -e "s/"test":.*/"build": "tsc",
    "test": "npm run build",
    "deploy": "cdk deploy",
    "destroy": "cdk destroy",
    "synthesize": "cdk synth"/" package.json && rm package.json.bak
